device_name: Voluson Expert 18; Voluson Expert 20; Voluson Expert 22
company: Ge Medical Systems Ultrasound and Primary Care Diagnostics
intended_use: The device is a general purpose ultrasound system intended for use by qualified and trained healthcare professionals. Specific clinical applications remain the same as previously cleared: Fetal/OB; Ab
intended_use_full: The device is a general purpose ultrasound system intended for use by qualified and trained healthcare professionals. Specific clinical applications remain the same as previously cleared: Fetal/OB; Abdominal (including GYN, pelvic and infertility monitoring/follicle development); Pediatric; Small Organ (breast, testes, thyroid etc.); Neonatal and Adult Cephalic; Cardiac (adult and pediatric); Musculo-skeletal Conventional and Superficial; Vascular; Transvaginal (including GYN); Transrectal
target_condition: First-trimester pregnancy assessment and fetal abnormality screening
ground_truth: Images curated and graded by a single sonographer, then reviewed and confirmed by a 5-sonographer review panel for discrepancies; standardized imaging protocol based on AIUM and ISUOG guidelines
other_metrics: SonoLyst IR: 0.93 accuracy with 0.80 acceptance criteria; SonoLyst X: 0.84 accuracy with 0.80 acceptance criteria; SonoLyst Live: 0.84 accuracy with 0.70 acceptance criteria; SonoBiometry CRL acceptability rate; Traffic light quality agreement 80% or higher; Transabdominal scanning: SonoLyst IR 94.1%, SonoLyst X 92.4%, SonoLyst Live 82.5%; Transvaginal scanning: SonoLyst IR 94.5%, SonoLyst X 93.1%, SonoLyst Live 82.1%; Regional performance (USA): SonoLyst IR 95.6%, SonoLyst X 92.9%, SonoLyst Live 83.2%; Regional performance (European): SonoLyst IR 94.8%, SonoLyst X 92.4%, SonoLyst Live 84.9%
